name: 19p13_3_LBR_subtelomeric_SD
description: 19p13.3 subtelomeric region with a complex SD cluster (LBR/MIER2/THEG paralog cassettes). Recurrent terminal deletions / duplications cause 19p13 microdeletion (ID, microcephaly, characteristic facies). MIER2 and APC2 contribute to dosage phenotype; flanking subtelomeric SDs at 19pter mediate a fraction of breakpoints. Distinct from the more common 19q13.11 microdeletion.

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SD cluster (~30-150 kb blocks) shared with other subtelomeric regions; critical genes MIER2, APC2, PLK5, THEG, ODF3L2, LBR (more proximal at 1q42). High GC-content and tight gene packing characteristic of 19pter.
